options.name: -bottom
options.description: specify an edge type on the bottom side

options.name: -cell
options.description: specify cell to which to add edge constraint

options.name: -cellRow
options.description: specify the row number for horizontal edge type

options.name: -half
options.description: half row of the specified cell row

options.name: -left
options.description: specify an edge type on the left side

options.name: -range
options.description: specify the range for vertical edge type

options.name: -reset
options.description: reset the specified cell constraint to lef status

options.name: -right
options.description: specify an edge type on the right side

options.name: -top
options.description: specify an edge type on the top side
